ruleset_version: Regelverk 2 - Operativt verifieringsregelverk för Certificate of Origin

certificate.label: Document A
certificate.quality_notes: Clear, text-based PDF with all fields legible. Original certificate issued by West Sweden Chamber of Commerce.

invoice.label: Document B
invoice.quality_notes: Clear, text-based PDF, 3 pages. All fields legible. Issued by Ericsson AB.

lc_check.lc_activation_reasoning: The certificate contains the text 'LC NUMBER: ILC017/53286/25'. The label 'LC NUMBER' is a SEPARATE field label that constitutes an explicit bank-term designation ('LC Number'). However, I must verify this meets the criteria in section 2.2. The text 'LC NUMBER:' is a separate field label followed by 'ILC017/53286/25'. 'LC NUMBER' is listed as one of the recognized designations. The reference 'ILC017/53286/25' is a separate number following the label. This meets the criteria for LC-exception activation. HOWEVER, I will proceed to verify whether LC-exception should be activated. The label 'LC NUMBER' is an explicit bank-term designation as a SEPARATE field label. The number 'ILC017/53286/25' follows it. This qualifies. Additionally, the invoice states 'Documentary credit' as mode of transport, confirming this is an LC transaction. LC exception IS eligible for activation. But since I can verify all checkpoints and provide a complete assessment, and since the LC exception would only require origin verification, I will activate the LC exception as required by rule 2.2 which has absolute precedence.

criteria_met: Certificate invoice reference 9209879237 matches invoice number 9209879237

pairing_validation.reasoning: All three sanity check criteria are met: (1) invoice number 9209879237 matches exactly, (2) consignor Ericsson AB is the invoice issuer, (3) consignee country Egypt matches. Valid document pair.

lc_exception_evaluation.reasoning: The certificate contains 'LC NUMBER: ILC017/53286/25' as a SEPARATE field label 'LC NUMBER' followed by the number 'ILC017/53286/25'. 'LC NUMBER' is explicitly listed as a recognized bank-term designation in section 2.2. The label is a standalone field in the Remarks box, not embedded within a reference number. The invoice also confirms this is a Documentary Credit transaction. Per section 2.2, only origin country shall be verified; all other checkpoints set to NOT_APPLICABLE.

consignor.motivation: LC-undantag aktiverat enligt avsnitt 2.2. Consignor-verifiering krävs inte vid LC-undantag.

consignor.debug_explanation: LC exception activated. Certificate contains 'LC NUMBER: ILC017/53286/25' as a separate field label. Per section 2.2, consignor verification is not required.

origin.motivation: Certifikatet anger ursprungsländer: CZ, VN, IE, PL, CN, MY, EE, MK, CR. Fakturan anger ursprungsland per artikelrad i en dedikerad CoO-kolumn. Alla nio ursprungsländer från certifikatet kan identifieras i fakturans CoO-kolumn: CZ (linjer 000100,000200,000800,000900,001000,001100,001200,001300), VN (linje 000700), IE (linjer 001400,001700), PL (linjer 001500,001800,002600,002700), CN (linjer 000300,001600,001900,002100,002200,002300,002400,002800,003200,003300,003400,003500), MY (linjer 002500,002900), EE (linje 003000), MK (linje 003100), CR (linje 002000 markerad '* CR, CN'). Alla certifikatets ursprungsländer kan identifieras i explicit CoO-fält i fakturan. MATCH.

Mixed origins – each origin country identified per article line

comparison_steps.result: Invoice has a dedicated 'CoO' column per line item listing country codes
FOUND – CR listed for line 002000 (marked '* CR, CN')

comparison_steps.description: Check for extra non-certificate origins in invoice
comparison_steps.result: Line 002000 has asterisk (*) with 'CR, CN' — both CR and CN are in certificate. No extra origins found outside certificate's list.

comparison_steps.description: LC-specific: Verify origins in explicit origin field
comparison_steps.result: Invoice has a dedicated CoO column per line item — this constitutes an explicit origin field. All nine countries verified.

origin.debug_explanation: Under LC exception (section 2.2), only origin country verification is required. The certificate lists 9 origin countries: CZ, VN, IE, PL, CN, MY, EE, MK, CR. The invoice has a dedicated 'CoO' column for each line item, which constitutes an explicit origin field per the LC-specific rule. Each of the 9 countries from the certificate can be identified in this dedicated CoO column. Line 002000 is marked with '*' and shows 'CR, CN' — both are in the certificate's list. No origin country appears in the invoice that is not listed in the certificate. All certificate origins are positively verified in an explicit origin field. MATCH with high confidence.

rule_evaluation_log.outcome: LC exception ACTIVATED. Certificate contains 'LC NUMBER: ILC017/53286/25' as a separate field label. Only origin verification required.
rule_evaluation_log.reasoning: The label 'LC NUMBER' is a separate field label in the Remarks box, matching the recognized designation 'LC Number'. The number 'ILC017/53286/25' follows directly. This is NOT embedded in a reference number. The invoice confirms 'Documentary credit' as mode of transport.

rule_evaluation_log.outcome: Valid pair identified: Certificate file = Document A (COO), Invoice file = Document B (Customs Invoice 9209879237 by Ericsson AB)
rule_evaluation_log.reasoning: Two files received. Document A is clearly a Certificate of Origin. Document B is a 3-page Customs Invoice. Certificate references invoice 9209879237, which matches the invoice number in Document B.
Criterion 1: Invoice number 9209879237 matches. Criterion 2: Consignor Ericsson AB = invoice issuer. Criterion 3: Consignee country Egypt matches invoice buyer country.

rule_evaluation_log.outcome: Origin identified via dedicated CoO column per line item
rule_evaluation_log.reasoning: Invoice contains a 'CoO' column alongside each line item with ISO alpha-2 country codes.

rule_evaluation_log.outcome: All 9 origin countries from certificate identified in invoice
rule_evaluation_log.reasoning: Certificate lists CZ, VN, IE, PL, CN, MY, EE, MK, CR. All found in invoice CoO column.

rule_evaluation_log.outcome: ISO alpha-2 codes used in both documents, no normalization needed
rule_evaluation_log.reasoning: Both certificate and invoice use standard ISO alpha-2 country codes.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: LC exception should NOT be activated because 'ILC017/53286/25' contains 'LC' as a substring
rejected_hypotheses.rejection_reason: The text in the certificate is 'LC NUMBER: ILC017/53286/25'. 'LC NUMBER' is a SEPARATE field label (one of the expressly recognized designations in section 2.2), not a substring embedded in a reference number. The label 'LC NUMBER' precedes the actual number and functions as a field header. The invoice also confirms 'Documentary credit'. The LC exception activation criteria are fully met.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: Line 002000 with asterisk (*) and 'CR, CN' might indicate an unknown or problematic origin
rejected_hypotheses.rejection_reason: The asterisk on line 002000 is accompanied by '* CR, CN', indicating dual origin (Costa Rica and China). Both CR and CN are listed in the certificate's origin countries. The asterisk likely denotes a split-origin item. Both countries are verified.

overall_assessment.human_explanation: Certifikatet innehåller en hänvisning till Letter of Credit (LC NUMBER: ILC017/53286/25), vilket innebär att enbart ursprungsland behöver verifieras. Samtliga nio ursprungsländer som anges i certifikatet (CZ, VN, IE, PL, CN, MY, EE, MK, CR) kan identifieras i fakturans ursprungslandskolumn. Dokumenten överensstämmer och kan godkännas.
non_blocking_observations: Certifikatets consignee (Commercial International Bank – Cairo) avser en bank, vilket är konsistent med att detta är en LC-transaktion där banken är mottagare. Fakturans köpare/mottagare är Etisalat Misr SAE. Denna skillnad är förväntad vid LC-transaktioner och verifieras inte vid LC-undantag.
Line 002000 in invoice has dual origin marked '* CR, CN'. Both countries are in the certificate's origin list.

human_readable_report.title: Verifieringsrapport – Certificate of Origin mot Faktura
human_readable_report.summary: LC-undantag aktiverat. Enbart ursprungsland verifierat. Alla nio ursprungsländer matchar. Resultat: IDENTICAL.

sections.motivation: Certifikatet innehåller en explicit LC-hänvisning med fältetikett 'LC NUMBER' följt av nummer 'ILC017/53286/25'. Fakturan bekräftar 'Documentary credit'. LC-undantag aktiverat.

sections.rule_applied: Varje ursprungsland i certifikatet identifierat i fakturans explicita CoO-fält
sections.motivation: Certifikatet anger nio ursprungsländer: CZ, VN, IE, PL, CN, MY, EE, MK, CR. Fakturan har en dedikerad CoO-kolumn per artikelrad som utgör ett explicit ursprungsfält. Samtliga nio länder kan identifieras: CZ på 8 rader, VN på 1 rad, IE på 2 rader, PL på 4 rader, CN på 12 rader, MY på 2 rader, EE på 1 rad, MK på 1 rad, CR på 1 rad (linje 002000 med dual origin CR, CN). Inga extra ursprungsländer utanför certifikatets lista förekommer i fakturan. MATCH.

output_quality_checks.consistency_details: All applicable checkpoints (origin only due to LC exception) have status MATCH. comparison_result = IDENTICAL is consistent. No MISMATCH or MANUAL_REVIEW on applicable checkpoints. Confidence 0.96 exceeds 0.85 floor.
